prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Blades in the Dark / Doskvol inspired industrial gothic supernatural atlas for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent under perpetual supernatural darkness, surrounded by the Void Sea, with a walled Doskvol-like canal metropolis, leaky industrial waterways, lightning rail lines, electroplasmic lightning towers, gang territory borders, deathlands beyond city walls, ghost-lit sectors, smoggy factory belts, leviathan-blood refineries and haunted moors.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated industrial gothic atlas, dark gaslamp cartography, soot-stained parchment, flickering gas lamps, smog and fog, electroplasmic blue lightning accents, criminal faction territory map mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait atlas view, single continent fills most of the vertical frame with surrounding black sea and offshore industrial fragments; include iron compass rose, gothic border, canal-route lines, rail lines, gang boundary shading, lightning tower symbols and ghost-field marks without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map crossing many climates and regions; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, fjords, capes, deltas, oily estuaries and varied landforms; include walled cities, canal deltas, industrial marshes, dark forests, barren deathlands, cold highlands, haunted coastlines and polluted harbors.
Avoid: bright heroic fantasy, clean steampunk optimism, modern satellite image, simple oval continent, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
